response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth across multiple domains, including developer tooling, test automation, and CI/CD infrastructure, with clear hands-on contributions to testing frameworks and build systems — aligning well with engineering productivity goals. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of people management, team leadership, or organizational change initiatives, which are critical for this managerial role. His open-source work and workshops demonstrate influence, but not formal leadership experience.
strengths: Extensive experience building developer tools and test automation frameworks (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Selenium course)
Proven technical leadership through open-source projects and cross-team knowledge sharing (workshops, talks)
Strong hands-on expertise in build systems, CI/CD, and mobile platforms (iOS/Apple TV maintenance, Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership roles beyond technical contributions
Lacks documented experience leading organizational change or setting cross-team engineering roadmaps
Minimal mention of mobile platform ecosystem experience beyond one iOS project, not scalable or systemic
